title: verilator generates vluint64_t ports for signed types

features.name: signed typedef used in port declarations
features.description: Code should include a signed typedef used in module port declarations (input and output ports)
features.snippet:
typedef logic signed [35-1:0] rc_t;
module test_negative(output logic o, output rc_t rc_out, input rc_t rc, input logic clk);

features.name: signed unpacked array assignment in always_ff
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block with assignments to an unpacked array of signed type

features.name: signed value compared to zero
features.description: Code should include a signed value compared to zero in a procedural assignment
